name: Lemon Barley Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pearl barley and water in a pan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer covered for 30 minutes.
2. Strain the liquid into a large jug.
3. Peel the lemons thinly, removing any white pith.
4. Remove the pith from the lemons and slice the fruit.
5. Add the sliced fruit and lemon peel to the jug with the barley liquid.
6. Stir in the sugar until dissolved.
7. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
8. Strain into a clean jug and store in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.
